name: Vanilla-Limeade Ice Cream Pie
recipeInstructions:
-------------
1. For the crust, take 11 of the wafers and trim 1/4 inch from one end of each. Set aside the trimmed wafers.
2. Crush the remaining 12 wafers along with the trimmed pieces.
3. Combine the crumbs with the melted butter. Press onto the bottom of a 9-inch pie plate.
4. Stand the trimmed wafers upright around the edge of the pie plate.
5. Freeze until the crust is firm, about 1 hour.
6. For the filling, spread 1 pint vanilla ice cream over the frozen crust.
7. Combine limeade and food coloring.
8. Drizzle 2 tablespoons of the mixture over the ice cream.
9. Return to freezer until firm, at least 1 hour. Repeat this process twice.
10. Freeze the completed pie for several hours or overnight.
11. If freezing longer, wrap the pie in freezer paper.
12. Remove from freezer and let stand for 15 minutes before serving.
-------------
